metrics.label: Automation Success Rate
metrics.tooltip: Percentage of workflow runs that completed successfully without errors in the selected period.

metrics.label: Document Processing
metrics.tooltip: Share of documents that were parsed, enriched, and routed by AI within the expected SLA.

metrics.label: Webhook Delivery Rate
metrics.tooltip: Successful outbound webhook deliveries versus total attempts, including retries.

metrics.label: AI Response Accuracy
metrics.tooltip: Estimated accuracy of AI-generated outputs based on validation checks and review feedback.

metrics.label: Queue Throughput
metrics.tooltip: How close the job queue is to target throughput capacity under current load.
